creator: denis.a.shestakov@gmail.com
text:
sonewconn: pcb 0xfffff8002299ca00 (local:/var/run/devd.seqpacket.pipe): Listen queue overflow: 1 already in queue awaiting acceptance (120 occurrences), euid 0, rgid 0, jail 0
[dp@home ~]$ netstat -Aan | grep 0xfffff8002299ca00
[dp@home ~]$ sysctl kern.ipc.somaxconn
kern.ipc.somaxconn: 1024
